title: Steve has this to say - which is about right:... — DEV Community
text:
Steve has this to say - which is about right:
steveklabnik @steveklabnik hate to have to actually say this, but folks, if a project has problems, the right thing to do is not use that project, *not* "email the maintainer and insult them" 16:44 PM - 17 Jul 2019 19 134
We need more communicators like Steve.
Are you sure you want to hide this comment? It will become hidden in your post, but will still be visible via the comment's permalink.
Hide child comments as well
Confirm
For further actions, you may consider blocking this person and/or reporting abuse
We're a place where coders share, stay up-to-date and grow their careers.
